duplicate_alias_reason: 정상영업이익률 maps to the same executable formula as 영업이익률 in the current source mapping.
EBIT마진 maps to the same executable formula as 영업이익률 in the current source mapping.
EBIT/총자산 maps to the same executable formula as 영업이익/총자산.
EBIT 이자보상배율 is identical to 이자보상배율 under the current EBIT mapping.
이자비용/매출액 uses the same numerator item code as 금융비용부담률; not an independent ratio in the current source mapping.
이자비용/EBITDA uses the same numerator item code as 금융비용/EBITDA; keep the semantically accurate financial-cost ratio.
순차입금상환가능기간 is identical to 순차입금/EBITDA.
순운전자본비율 is identical to 순운전자본/총자산.
순운전자본/매출액 is identical to 운전자본/매출액.
현금성자산/유동부채 is identical to 현금비율.
OCF/유동부채 duplicates the debt-service OCF/유동부채 ratio.
재고보유기간 is identical to 재고자산회전일수.
매출채권회수기간 is identical to 매출채권회전일수.
매입채무지급기간 is identical to 매입채무회전일수.
정상영업이익증가율 maps to the same executable formula as 영업이익증가율.
EBIT증가율 maps to the same executable formula as 영업이익증가율.
R185 and R241 are both 이익잉여금증가율 and value-identical in current Stage00_02 artifacts; keep R241 as current canonical selected growth variable.
Altman 운전자본/총자산 is identical to 순운전자본/총자산.
Altman 이익잉여금/총자산 is identical to 이익잉여금/총자산.
OCF/매출액 is identical to 영업현금흐름마진.
